description: Create a new OAPP in non-interactive / scripted mode. The CLI uses StarnetUiScriptedCreateCli to drive the wizard without stdin.
notes: Requires avatar beam-in. Add --username / --password flags or set STAR_CLI_USERNAME/PASSWORD env vars.
On success returns { success: true, data: { id, name, ... } }.
The created OAPP id should be saved — pass it to oapp-show or holon-create recipes next.
After creation, run 'oapp light' to generate STAR-Light code from the OAPP DNA.

example.description: Create a time-bank OAPP for the PanGalactic project
argv: Decentralised time credit exchange for the OASIS metaverse
